items.title: add and update toronto, ontario breweries
fix: update Mac and Jacks Brewery status to closed
Updated Flying Dreams Brewing to closed

releases.title: v1.0.13
releases.notes:
What's Changed
* Bump symfony/http-foundation from 7.3.4 to 7.3.7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/112
* gh actions: bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/113
* 2026-02-08 dependency updates by @alexjustesen in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/116
Full Changelog: https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/compare/v1.0.12...v1.0.13

releases.title: v1.0.1
releases.notes:
What's Changed
* [Feature] Add autocomplete endpoint for breweries and redirect to search by @alexjustesen in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/88
* [Chore] Update CODEOWNERS to include @chrisjm for reviews by @alexjustesen in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/89
* [Fix] Update CORS allowed origins to wildcard by @chrisjm in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/85
